description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a large, rounded head and proportionally smaller body, arms, and legs. The child is dressed in a formal outfit consisting of a fitted jacket, collared shirt, and long pants, with shoes that appear sturdy and practical. The hair is short, straight, and neatly styled, with a defined hairline and no visible accessories. The arms are extended outward to the sides, and the legs are straight and parallel, giving the figure a neutral, T-pose stance. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with subtle texturing to suggest fabric and hair detail. No backpack or handheld items are present, and the figure's features are simplified for a cartoon-like appearance.
description: A stylized child in a formal outfit with short, straight hair, standing in a neutral T-pose. The figure has a large head, smooth matte surfaces, and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the parted hairstyle and the broad shoulders of the jacket.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, facial features, and the straight alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the soles of the shoes, the underside of the arms, and the rounded shape of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face, the jacket's fit, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: formal jacket, collared shirt, and long pants
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a defined hairline
attribute_posture: standing with arms extended outward in a T-pose
